title: Review: jmap-chat idiomaticity final
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — validation logic is correct, tests are thorough, main risk is copy-paste confusion around the push_subscription_create manual construction path.
Confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) url::Url path() behavior for edge-case URL forms (IPv6 literals, percent-encoded hostnames) not explicitly tested; (2) push_subscription_create has_chat_push=true manual construction path not independently verified against USING_CORE+USING_CHAT_PUSH vs a hypothetical USING_CHAT_PUSH const. Would raise confidence if: a test for 'https://100.64.1.1:8008' (the documented IP:port example) is added; a test for IPv6 base_url 'https://[::1]:8008' is added.
